name: cached-subagent-harness
description: Cache-aware subagent orchestration, lifecycle ledgers, and complete-development gates for agentic CLIs.

interface.longDescription: Adds a cached-subagent-harness skill and Rust harnessctl tool for stable prompts, SQLite lifecycle ledgers, write-scope gates, review/fix loops, and final audits when coordinating subagents.
defaultPrompt: Use cached-subagent-harness for this long-running refactor.
Coordinate subagents with stable prompts and a ledger.
Audit open subagents before finishing this task.
